metadata.tagline: Construction & renovation in Montreal — residential & multi-unit
metadata.defaultDescription: General contractor for construction and renovation in Montreal and surrounding region. Kitchens, bathrooms, multi-unit buildings, extensions. RBQ licensed, free quote within 48 hours.

hero.title: Rigorous renovations, at a fair price.
hero.subtitle: Bathrooms, kitchens and full apartments across Greater Montreal. We own multi-unit buildings ourselves — we manage your budget like we manage ours.

services.title: Our renovation services
services.subtitle: Focused expertise, executed by the book.

bathroom.title: Bathroom
bathroom.description: Design, plumbing, tiling, custom vanities. We handle everything.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
kitchen.description: Full renovation: cabinets, countertops, electrical, ventilation.

multi.title: Multi-unit
multi.description: Full-apartment turnovers for building owners. Proven recipe, optimized cost.

complete.title: Full renovation
complete.description: Complete upgrade of a unit or building. One point of contact.

items.title: We are owners ourselves
items.desc: We own multi-unit buildings. Your budget is treated like our own.

items.title: Integrated team
items.desc: No rogue subcontracting. Our trades, our quality control.

items.title: Full transparency
items.desc: Itemized pricing, clear schedule, digital site tracking.

items.title: Exemplary finish
items.desc: Our trademark. Check our delivered projects before you commit.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We reply within 24 business hours.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Fill in this form. A team member reaches out within 24 business hours.

fields.name: Full name
fields.consent: I agree to be contacted by Horizon Services Immobiliers about my request.
fields.marketing: I would like occasional tips and offers.

contact.success: Thank you! Your request was received. Reference: {reference}. We will contact you within 24 business hours.
